value_chain_position: EUV and DUV lithography equipment — the singular chokepoint every leading-edge chip fab must use; no fab can manufacture <7nm chips without ASML's tools.
relative_comps: ASML holds a literal monopoly on EUV lithography; no competitor has approached production-grade EUV. In DUV it competes with Nikon and Canon but retains majority share. The only near-term risk is export restrictions limiting China revenue (~15% of sales). ASML's high-NA EUV (next generation) cements the moat for the 2nm era. Revenue growth at ~10% YoY is subdued due to order lumpiness; the backlog is >$40B. FCF margin of 25%+ is structurally high for capital equipment. Trades at ~35x forward earnings — premium reflects monopoly status.
